## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.7

### 🔔 Notifications
- Waits for a cached playable recording before firing camera event notifications that include a recording link.
- Skips recording-link notifications when the camera event recording cache does not produce media instead of sending a notification that opens an unplayable clip.
- Updates the camera notification blueprint to require both the X-Sense Recordings panel link and cached media proof before sending the recording-ready notification.

### 🎥 Recordings
- Plays recordings through a private authenticated Home Assistant fetch and temporary browser video URL instead of raw media, external, or public-folder URLs.
- Adds clearer X-Sense Recordings panel loading and playback error states when a clip is still being prepared.

### 🛠️ Repairs
- Marks the previous camera notification blueprint as stale so Home Assistant can prompt users to refresh imported blueprints.
- Updates README wording across the language files to describe the cache-first recording notification behavior.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage that camera event notifications are not fired when recording cache produces no media.
- Adds regression coverage for authenticated blob playback in the X-Sense Recordings panel and current blueprint detection.
